name: incubator-build
description: Incubator Build — curated skills and subagents for planning, code review, debugging, and shipping pull requests.

interface.shortDescription: Curated skills for planning, code review, debugging, and shipping PRs.
interface.longDescription: Incubator Build provides a curated set of skills and subagents for the engineering loop: planning before code, reviewing PRs (or local changes) with structured personas, debugging systematically, resolving review feedback, and shipping pull requests with value-first descriptions.
defaultPrompt: Use Incubator Build to plan this change
Review this PR with Incubator Build
Ship this PR with Incubator Build
